title: Alchemical Insight
definition: The fusion of intellectual epiphany and spiritual enlightenment resulting in a profound transformation of one's being.

difficulty_levels.beginner: The fusion of intellectual epiphany and spiritual enlightenment resulting in a profound transformation of one's being.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: The fusion of intellectual epiphany and spiritual enlightenment resulting in a profound transformation of one's being.
difficulty_levels.expert: Combining the 'Aha!' moment of scientific discovery with the 'Oh...' of spiritual interconnectedness results in an alchemical journey that rewires one's very essence, transcending mere information acquisition.

extra_fields.insight: Combining the 'Aha!' moment of scientific discovery with the 'Oh...' of spiritual interconnectedness results in an alchemical journey that rewires one's very essence, transcending mere information acquisition.
